name: narrow part of the chimney
description: I'm in a narrow part of the chimney
hints: A chimney sweep is stuck here. You need to help free him.
PUSH SWEEP or PRESS SWEEP to free the chimney sweep. He will reward you.
PRESS SWEEP to free him - he pops out, thanks you, and gives you a piece of paper with important information.
PRESS SWEEP to free him. He gives you a paper with clues. DOWN returns to the main chimney area.

needs: Stuck Chimney Sweep (must be in room)
effects:
Message: Sweep pops out, thanks me, hands me a piece of paper then
vanishes!

notes: Narrow chimney with a stuck chimney sweep. PRESS SWEEP frees him and he gives you a paper with important clues. DOWN returns to the main chimney (room 14).
